query:
SELECT 
  i.id, i.invoiceNumber, i.invoice_code as invoiceCode, i.amount, i.status, 
  i.userId, u.name as userName, u.email as userEmail,
  i.projectId, p.name as projectName, i.submittedAt, i.description
FROM invoices i
LEFT JOIN users u ON i.userId = u.id
LEFT JOIN projects p ON i.projectId = p.id
WHERE i.auto_generated = 1 AND i.status = 'pending'
ORDER BY i.invoiceNumber ASC;
